md: [Relevant background, files, source material, data, links, or constraints]
[Exact structure: bullets, table, JSON, patch, report, image specs, etc.]
- [How the agent should verify the result]
- [What must be true when the work is done]
xml: <prompt>
<task>[Specific action to perform]</task>
<context>[Relevant background, files, source material, data, links, or constraints]</context>
<output_format>[Exact structure: bullets, table, JSON, patch, report, image specs, etc.]</output_format>
<success_criteria>
<item>[How the agent should verify the result]</item>
<item>[What must be true when the work is done]</item>
</success_criteria>
<constraints>[Optional boundaries or things to preserve]</constraints>
<examples>[Optional sample output or style reference]</examples>
</prompt>
toml: profile = "general"
task = "[Specific action to perform]"
context = "[Relevant background, files, source material, data, links, or constraints]"
output_format = "[Exact structure: bullets, table, JSON, patch, report, image specs, etc.]"
success_criteria = [
"[How the agent should verify the result]",
"[What must be true when the work is done]"
constraints = "[Optional boundaries or things to preserve]"
examples = "[Optional sample output or style reference]"

md: [Files, components, issue, current behavior, logs, API, or existing code to use]
[Patch, plan, table, diff summary, commands, docs, screenshots, etc.]
- [Test, command, acceptance criterion, or observable behavior]
- [How to know the work is complete]
- Plan-first: [when to inspect and wait for confirmation]
xml: <prompt profile="software">
<task>[Build/fix/change/refactor specific thing]</task>
<scope>[Files, components, issue, current behavior, logs, API, or existing code to use]</scope>
<constraints>
<item>Preserve [behavior/API/data/design]</item>
<item>Do not change [out-of-scope area]</item>
</constraints>
<output_format>[Patch, plan, table, diff summary, commands, docs, screenshots, etc.]</output_format>
<success_criteria>
<item>[Test, command, acceptance criterion, or observable behavior]</item>
<item>[How to know the work is complete]</item>
</success_criteria>
<plan_first>[Optional approval boundary for risky work]</plan_first>
</prompt>
toml: profile = "software"
task = "[Build/fix/change/refactor specific thing]"
scope = "[Files, components, issue, current behavior, logs, API, or existing code to use]"
constraints = [
"Preserve [behavior/API/data/design]",
"Do not change [out-of-scope area]"
output_format = "[Patch, plan, table, diff summary, commands, docs, screenshots, etc.]"
success_criteria = [
"[Test, command, acceptance criterion, or observable behavior]",
"[How to know the work is complete]"
plan_first = "[Optional approval boundary for risky work]"

md: [Subject details: type, color, materials, pose, condition, objects, scene]
[Photorealistic, cinematic, 3D, watercolor, vector, anime, brand style, mood]
[Aspect ratio, orientation, resolution, transparent background, file type]
- Avoid: [text, logos, extra people, clutter, unsafe elements]
- Example/style reference: [image, brand, artist-free visual reference]
- Success criteria: [what should be visually obvious]
xml: <prompt profile="image">
<task>Create an image of [specific subject].</task>
<visual_details>[Subject details: type, color, materials, pose, condition, objects, scene]</visual_details>
<style>[Photorealistic, cinematic, 3D, watercolor, vector, anime, brand style, mood]</style>
<output_format>[Aspect ratio, orientation, resolution, transparent background, file type]</output_format>
<avoid>[Optional: text, logos, extra people, clutter, unsafe elements]</avoid>
<examples>[Optional image, brand, or style reference]</examples>
</prompt>
toml: profile = "image"
task = "Create an image of [specific subject]."
visual_details = "[Subject details: type, color, materials, pose, condition, objects, scene]"
style = "[Photorealistic, cinematic, 3D, watercolor, vector, anime, brand style, mood]"
output_format = "[Aspect ratio, orientation, resolution, transparent background, file type]"
avoid = "[Optional: text, logos, extra people, clutter, unsafe elements]"
examples = "[Optional image, brand, or style reference]"

md: [Write, rewrite, edit, summarize, or proofread specific material]
[Who will read it and what they already know]
[What the writing should accomplish or make the reader do/understand]
[Paste notes, outline, transcript, draft, link, or attachment path]
[Tone, length, structure, headings, bullets, email, memo, AP style, etc.]
xml: <prompt profile="writing">
<task>[Write, rewrite, edit, summarize, or proofread specific material]</task>
<audience>[Who will read it and what they already know]</audience>
<purpose>[What the writing should accomplish or make the reader do/understand]</purpose>
<source_material>[Paste notes, outline, transcript, draft, link, or attachment path]</source_material>
<output_format>[Tone, length, structure, headings, bullets, email, memo, AP style, etc.]</output_format>
<examples>[Optional sample to imitate]</examples>
</prompt>
toml: profile = "writing"
task = "[Write, rewrite, edit, summarize, or proofread specific material]"
audience = "[Who will read it and what they already know]"
purpose = "[What the writing should accomplish or make the reader do/understand]"
source_material = "[Paste notes, outline, transcript, draft, link, or attachment path]"
output_format = "[Tone, length, structure, headings, bullets, email, memo, AP style, etc.]"
examples = "[Optional sample to imitate]"

md: [Specific question or decision the research should answer]
[Date range, geography, audience, exclusions, and depth]
[Official docs, papers, credible sources, links, or allowed source types]
[How options should be compared: cost, features, risks, tradeoffs, etc.]
[Brief, table, memo, recommendation, citations, uncertainty notes]
- Uncertainty rule: [mark unknowns instead of guessing]
xml: <prompt profile="research">
<research_question>[Specific question or decision the research should answer]</research_question>
<scope>[Date range, geography, audience, exclusions, and depth]</scope>
<sources>[Official docs, papers, credible sources, links, or allowed source types]</sources>
<criteria>[How options should be compared: cost, features, risks, tradeoffs, etc.]</criteria>
<output_format>[Brief, table, memo, recommendation, citations, uncertainty notes]</output_format>
<uncertainty_rule>[Optional: mark unknowns instead of guessing]</uncertainty_rule>
</prompt>
toml: profile = "research"
research_question = "[Specific question or decision the research should answer]"
scope = "[Date range, geography, audience, exclusions, and depth]"
sources = "[Official docs, papers, credible sources, links, or allowed source types]"
criteria = "[How options should be compared: cost, features, risks, tradeoffs, etc.]"
output_format = "[Brief, table, memo, recommendation, citations, uncertainty notes]"
uncertainty_rule = "[Optional: mark unknowns instead of guessing]"

md: [Analyze, clean, calculate, visualize, or summarize specific data]
[Metric, segment, hypothesis, comparison, or trend to answer]
[Definitions for revenue, churn, conversion, retention, p95, etc.]
[Chart, table, summary, JSON, notebook, dashboard, or code]
[Row counts, totals, expected ranges, reconciliation, or sanity checks]
- Assumptions: [how to handle missing or ambiguous data]
xml: <prompt profile="data_analysis">
<task>[Analyze, clean, calculate, visualize, or summarize specific data]</task>
<data_source>[File/table/query/source and relevant columns]</data_source>
<question>[Metric, segment, hypothesis, comparison, or trend to answer]</question>
<metrics>[Definitions for revenue, churn, conversion, retention, p95, etc.]</metrics>
<output_format>[Chart, table, summary, JSON, notebook, dashboard, or code]</output_format>
<validation>[Row counts, totals, expected ranges, reconciliation, or sanity checks]</validation>
</prompt>
toml: profile = "data_analysis"
task = "[Analyze, clean, calculate, visualize, or summarize specific data]"
data_source = "[File/table/query/source and relevant columns]"
question = "[Metric, segment, hypothesis, comparison, or trend to answer]"
metrics = "[Definitions for revenue, churn, conversion, retention, p95, etc.]"
output_format = "[Chart, table, summary, JSON, notebook, dashboard, or code]"
validation = "[Row counts, totals, expected ranges, reconciliation, or sanity checks]"

md: [Create, polish, summarize, or turn material into a deck]
[Who will see the presentation and what they care about]
[Decision, pitch, update, training outcome, or takeaway]
[Key sections, narrative arc, and must-have messages]
[Slide count, speaker notes, visual style, timing, format, brand constraints]
- Source material: [notes, transcript, report, metrics, attachment path]
- Success criteria: [what a good deck enables]
xml: <prompt profile="presentation">
<task>[Create, polish, summarize, or turn material into a deck]</task>
<audience>[Who will see the presentation and what they care about]</audience>
<goal>[Decision, pitch, update, training outcome, or takeaway]</goal>
<storyline>[Key sections, narrative arc, and must-have messages]</storyline>
<output_format>[Slide count, speaker notes, visual style, timing, format, brand constraints]</output_format>
<source_material>[Optional notes, transcript, report, metrics, attachment path]</source_material>
</prompt>
toml: profile = "presentation"
task = "[Create, polish, summarize, or turn material into a deck]"
audience = "[Who will see the presentation and what they care about]"
goal = "[Decision, pitch, update, training outcome, or takeaway]"
storyline = "[Key sections, narrative arc, and must-have messages]"
output_format = "[Slide count, speaker notes, visual style, timing, format, brand constraints]"
source_material = "[Optional notes, transcript, report, metrics, attachment path]"
